signal.h(3) Library Functions Manual signal.h(3)

NAME

signal.h - Cross-platform crash signal and exception handling.

SYNOPSIS

Typedefs


typedef void(* platform_crash_handler_t) (int signal, void *context)
Callback function type for crash handlers.

Functions


asciichat_error_t platform_install_crash_handler (platform_crash_handler_t handler)
Install a crash signal handler. asciichat_error_t platform_uninstall_crash_handler (void)
Uninstall the crash signal handler. const char * platform_signal_name (int signal)
Get human-readable name for signal number.

Detailed Description

Cross-platform crash signal and exception handling.

Definition in file signal.h.
